ingredients_text: Pork Cocktail Sausages (67%) (British Outdoor Bred Pork (80%), Water, Gluten Free Crumb (Rice Flour, Chickpea Flour, Cornflour, Salt), Potato Starch, Salt, Ground Spices (Black Pepper, Nutmeg, Mace, White Pepper), Stabiliser: E450, Natural Flavouring, Dried Sage, Yeast Extract, Dried Yeast, Preservative: E223 (_Sulphites)_, Antioxidant: Ascorbic Acid), Smoked Streaky Bacon (33%) (British Outdoor Bred Pork (97%), Curing Salt (Salt, Preservative: Potassium Nitrate, Sodium Nitrite), Sugar, Antioxidant: E301).
